OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "ContractId": "8007x00000fdvjZAAQ", "pncId": "0mw7x0000001EAbAAM", "lstclinicianandHPF": "0bS7x0000003OgvEAE", "lstRateCPAandPCA": { "selectRate": true, "AccountName": "Service Account Test", "CPAId": "0rR7x0000000QDpEAM", "BonusMeasureType": "NA", "PCAId": "0s47x0000000TQDAA2", "Shift__c": "a4Q7x000000E1fNEAS", "PCAFacility_Rate__c": "0s47x00000009eQAAQ", "CPAStatus": "DRAFT", "CPAFacility_Rate__c": "0rR7x00000004gLEAQ", "FacilityTitleName": "Ambassador Physician", "RecordtypeName": "Clinician", "CPAName": "00004788-18092025-HPF-00000015-Shift", "TargetMeasurePercent": 0, "BonusPayout": 0, "ShiftFullName": "Night- DO NOT USE 1", "ContractPaymentAgreementId": "0rR7x0000000QDpEAM", "CPAType__c": "Shift", "CPAKey": "C0A2F5E27786F678F0A11373DE6F53041439017666", "Name": "PCA-10493", "PNCId": "0mw7x0000001EAbAAM", "CPAContractId": "8007x00000fdvjZAAQ", "FacilityTitle__c": "0hs7x0000007K8bAAE", "OverrideProhibited": false, "CPAAgreementType": "Preventive Care Agreement", "TypeNew": "Night- DO NOT USE 1", "Unit_of_Measure__c": "per Monthly Tier", "Rate__c": 35 }, "Type": "Shift", "ContextId": "8007x00000fdvjZAAQ", "Err_ProcessType": "IP", "Err_CtxId": "8007x00000fdvjZAAQ", "Err_RunningContext": "Clinician_ConfigureRates", "omniScriptId": "0jN7x0000004eZxEAI", "elementName": "ContractRate_CreateCPAandPCRecords" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateCPAandPCARecords

childElements.name: DeleteCPA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(SV_DefaultValue:DeselectPCAlist) && (SV_DefaultValue:CPASize == 1 || SV_DefaultValue:CPASize == SV_DefaultValue:PCASize) && ( ISBLANK(SV_DefaultValue:Clientlist) || (SV_DefaultValue:UncheckClient == SV_DefaultValue:AllClient))", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "ContractPaymentAgreement", "Id" : "%SV_DefaultValue:DeselectCPAlist%", "AllOrNone" : true } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreateCPAandPCA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(LA_DataLoadList)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "Rates:CPAAgreementType" : "Preventive Care Agreement", "Rates:LA_MergeList" : "%DRTPCACPAAddition:Output%", "Rates:typeOfRate" : "%Type%", "Rates:Status" : "%SV_SetContractFields:Status%", "Rates:contractId" : "%ContractId%", "Rates:accountId" : "%DREFetchContractCPAandPCA:contractRec:AccountId%", "Rates:PNCId" : "%pncId%", "Rates:CPAName" : "=%DREFetchContractCPAandPCA:contractRec:ContractNumber%+'-'+%DRFetchServiceAccountDetails:pncRec:Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r:Account:Global_Account_ID__c%+'-'+%DRFetchServiceAccountDetails:pncRec:Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r:HPF_Number__c%+'-'+%Type%", "Rates:CPA_Id" : "%SV_DefaultValue:CPAId%", "Rates:CPAFacilityRate" : "%SV_DefaultValue:CPAFacilityRate%", "Rates:PCAFacilityRate" : "%SV_DefaultValue:PCAFacilityRate%", "Rates:StartDate" : "=FORMATDATETIMEGMT(%DREFetchContractCPAandPCA:contractRec:StartDate%)", "Rates:FacilityTitle" : "%lstFacility%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "UpdateRespCPA", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateCPAandPCAV2", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_DefaultValue
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "CPAId" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(LA_CheckClinician),IF(LA_CheckClinician|1:CPAContractId == ContractId, LA_CheckClinician|1:CPAId, null),null)", "CPAFacilityRate" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(LA_CheckClient),LA_CheckClient|1:CPAId,null)", "DeselectPCAlist" : "=LIST(LA_CheckClinicianDeselect:PCAId)", "DeselectCPAlist" : "=LIST(LA_CheckClinicianDeselect:CPAId)", "PCAFacilityRate" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(LA_CheckClient),LA_CheckClient|1:PCAId,null)", "CPASize" : "=LISTSIZE(LA_CheckClinician)", "PCASize" : "=LISTSIZE(LA_CheckClinicianDeselect)", "SameContract" : "=IF(LA_CheckClinician|1:CPAContractId == ContractId, true, false)", "Clientlist" : "=LIST(LA_CheckClient:CPAId)", "AllClient" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(LA_Client:CPAId),LISTSIZE(LA_Client:CPAId),0)", "UncheckClient" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(LA_UncheckClient:CPAId),LISTSIZE(LA_UncheckClient:CPAId),0)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_SetContractFields
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "clinicianContractRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"SELECT Id FROM Recordtype WHERE SobjectType = 'contract' and DeveloperName ='Clinician'\")", "Status" : "Draft" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }
